input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.7.7.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.7.7.1
            TITLE: any part of any aerodynamic device that is located:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.7.1: Any part of any Aerodynamic Device that is located:
T.7.7.1 Any part of any Aerodynamic Device that is located:   
a. In the Rear Aerodynamic Zone must be no higher than 1200 mm above the ground  
b. Outside of the Rear Aerodynamic Zone must be no higher than 500 mm above the 
ground
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 71 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
c. Forward of the centerline of the front wheel axles and outboard of two vertical planes 
parallel to the centerline of the chassis touching the inside of the front tires at the height 
of the hubs must be no higher than 250 mm above the ground

final_answer: T.7.7.1: Any part of any Aerodynamic Device that is located: a. In the Rear Aerodynamic Zone must be no higher than 1200 mm above the ground b. Outside of the Rear Aerodynamic Zone must be no higher than 500 mm above the ground c. Forward of the centerline of the front wheel axles and outboard of two vertical planes parallel to the centerline of the chassis touching the inside of the front tires at the height of the hubs must be no higher than 250 mm above the ground
